zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏多趋势
zh.content:
目前ETH价格位于2024.67美元，较24小时内轻微下跌0.19%，显示市场短期略显观望。价格虽接近日内低点，但仍高于20日均线2013.59美元，表明短期支撑仍然有效，整体趋势偏多，但动能不足以形成强烈上涨。

MACD指标当前为3.078，显示多头动能尚存，但信号线数据缺失，需关注未来交叉变化以判断趋势延续性。价格在2031.91美元附近面临强阻力，如突破将可能触发进一步上涨；下方2020美元附近为关键支撑，短期回调可在此区域寻找承接。

技术上，ETH短线呈现震荡整理格局，投资者可关注均线支撑及阻力位。若价格稳住20日均线并伴随MACD上升，建议可逢低布局；反之若跌破支撑，则需防范短期下行风险。

交易策略上，可考虑短线低吸高抛结合趋势跟随操作，控制仓位并设置止损以应对波动。同时，关注市场情绪和宏观消息，以辅助技术信号，降低操作风险，实现稳健收益。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently showing a modest bearish sentiment, hovering around $2024.67 after testing a high near $2031.91. Price action indicates a consolidation phase just above the 20-period SMA at $2013.59, suggesting that the short-term trend is cautiously bullish but facing resistance near the recent highs. The minor 24-hour decline of 0.19% reflects low volatility, hinting that market participants are awaiting a clear catalyst to drive the next directional move.  

The MACD reading of 3.078 indicates that bullish momentum has been building, although the lack of a signal line prevents confirmation of a crossover. Traders should watch for a potential MACD line crossing above its signal, which would reinforce a buy bias. Conversely, if momentum stalls or reverses, a retest of the SMA support could occur. With the RSI currently unavailable, careful attention to volume and price patterns is advisable to gauge overbought or oversold conditions.  

Key support is likely around the $2013-$2020 zone, aligning with the 20-period SMA, providing a base for buyers. Resistance appears near $2032, marking the upper range of the last 24 hours. Breaking above this level could trigger a bullish run toward $2050, whereas failure to hold support could see prices drift toward $2000, reinforcing a cautious trading environment. Traders may use these levels for risk management and position sizing.  

For trading strategy, short-term traders might consider entering on dips near the SMA with tight stop-losses just below $2010. Momentum traders could wait for MACD confirmation or a break above $2032 to ride a potential upward swing. Conservative participants may prefer to observe price consolidation, targeting opportunities on a decisive breakout or breakdown. Overall, ETH/USD remains in a delicate balance, requiring careful monitoring of technical signals and support/resistance levels.
